# Vortex Digital

> Vortex Digital is a Moroccan digital agency specializing in premium website design and AI automation systems. We build production-grade websites using Next.js and React, and deploy AI automation workflows using n8n, OpenAI, and Claude — helping Moroccan businesses run 24/7 without manual intervention.

## About

- [Homepage](https://vortexagence.com): Full agency overview — services, portfolio, process, testimonials, and contact
- [Start a Project](https://vortexagence.com/start-project): 3-step project intake wizard for new client onboarding

## Services

Vortex Digital offers three core services to businesses in Morocco and the Arab world:

1. **Premium Website Design** — Custom websites built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Delivered in 7–21 days with full animations and mobile-first design.
2. **AI Automation Systems** — WhatsApp chatbots, lead qualification agents, appointment booking, and multi-step n8n workflows powered by OpenAI and Claude models.
3. **Brand Identity** — Logo design, visual identity, and digital brand systems aligned with business goals.

## Key Facts

- Location: Morocco (serving Arabic, French, and English-speaking markets)
- Languages: Arabic (Darija), French, English
- Turnaround: 7–10 days for landing pages, 3–6 weeks for full systems
- Support: 30 days free post-launch support included with every project
- Contact: vortexagence.digital@gmail.com | WhatsApp: +212705960845
- Working hours: Monday–Saturday, 09:00–22:00

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does a project take?**
Most projects are delivered in 3–5 weeks. Landing pages ship in 7–10 days. Full AI automation systems take 3–6 weeks with daily progress updates.

**What technologies does Vortex Digital use?**
Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. AI layer: OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, custom prompt engineering. Automation: n8n and Make for multi-step workflows.

**How does AI automation work for a business?**
The AI handles customer inquiries 24/7 in Arabic, French, or English — qualifying leads, booking appointments, sending follow-ups, and generating personalized responses automatically.

**Is there a guarantee?**
Yes. If any deliverable does not match the agreed specifications, Vortex Digital revises it at no additional cost.

**How to get started?**
Visit https://vortexagence.com/start-project or send a WhatsApp message to +212705960845. A free 30-minute discovery call is offered to all new clients.
